user_prompt: Can you guide bolter a repair?
prayer:
Approach the bolter with mechadendrite reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah's forge-light.
Inspect the sacred firing mechanisms for battle-wounds upon the bolter's holy frame.
Anoint fractured casings with sacred unguents to invoke repair upon the bolter.
Chant the Litany of Mending as the Machine Spirit stirs within its repaired vaults.
Verify the bolter's wrathful song through test-ignition rituals.

Hasten to the hydraulic press, invoking cooling mercies from the Omnissiah's chill vaults.
Divert blessed coolant through overheated pistons of the hydraulic press.
Beseech the Machine Spirit to embrace the cooling rites amidst thermal fury.
Monitor sacred pressure flows as the hydraulic press yields to sanctified chill.
Seal the cycle with the Canticle of Equilibrium.

user_prompt: Ready the cooling system for purification
prayer:
Prepare the cooling system with ritual purity, honoring the Omnissiah's untainted flows.
Flush impure residues from the cooling system's sacred conduits.
Invoke purification upon the cooling system with sanctified ablative fluids.
Beseech the Machine Spirit to purge all corruption from its chilled essence.
Conclude with diagnostic litanies affirming the cooling system's pristine vigil.

Chant the Rite of Focal Wrath to empower ballistic divination.
Test the Chimera APC's targeting fury against shadowed foes.

Affirm the drop pod's consecrated plunge through auspex hymns.
